name: Apple-Oat Bran Scones
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Bran flakes cereal; oat or wheat
1 large Red apple; cored and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 425 degrees. Grease a large baking sheet.
In a large bowl, combine flour, cereal, baking powder, cinnamon, and salt.
In a medium bowl, beat together milk, oil, sugar, and egg.
Add to dry ingredients, along with chopped apple; mix lightly with a fork until mixture clings together and forms a soft dough.
Turn dough out onto a lightly floured surface and knead gently 5 or 6 times.
Divide dough into two halves. With a lightly floured rolling pin, roll one half of the dough into a 7-inch round. Cut into 4 wedges. Repeat with remaining dough.
Place scones about an inch apart on prepared pan. Pierce tops with the tines of a fork. Brush tops with melted butter and sprinkle with additional cinnamon if desired.
Bake for 15 to 18 minutes, or until golden brown. Serve warm.
